items.title: Score outdoor seating for your space while this 4-piece wicker set is only $150 shipped

Best Choice 4-Piece Outdoor Wicker Patio Set

Buy for $150 (Reg. $190)

What we love

If you want to affordably add outdoor seating to your yard, patio, porch, or deck, here’s a option worth a moment of your time. At $150 shipped, it offers a significant value that comes from one of the more reputable brands in this space over at Amazon.

items.title: Affordably upgrade your pool with ECOVACS’ Ultramarine P1 cordless robotic cleaner back at its $299 low ($201 off)

It’s down from a $500 MSRP here, which we first saw drop to this all-time low price during last month’s Prime Day event. Now, you’re getting another chance to affordably upgrade your pool cleaning support with a $201 markdown, while some of the brand’s robot floor cleaner deals can be found in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: I have a 5-tier metal storage shelf like this in my basement, grab one for yours down at $46.50
items.summary:
GarveeHome 5-Tier Metal Storage Shelf

Buy for $46.50 (Reg. $55.50)

What we love

I have a unit like this in my basement and use it to store tech boxes, protein powder, and more. It’s really a catch-all for stuff that I need to hold on to, but don’t really have a dedicated spot for quite yet. This unit can hold up to “2,000 pounds” and stands 5 feet tall. I like that it can be split into two shorter shelves as well.

items.title: Score six heavy-duty large moving or storage bags while they’re under $4 each (Save 44%)

Buy for $22.50 (Reg. $40)

What we love

While these are pitched as moving bags, the utility doesn’t stop there. They can be used to tidy up a storage room too. So if you’ve got holiday decor, seasonal clothes, or really just about anything that would look better in a bag, consider grabbing six of these for less than $4 each.

items.title: Anker’s SOLIX Summer Power Sale offers up to 49% savings, like the 3,840Wh F3800 power station at exclusive $1,615, more
items.summary: Anker is celebrating the rest of the World Cup with its newly launched Summer Power Sale that is offering up to 49% discounts on power stations – plus, you’ll be getting even better deals thanks to our exclusive bonus 5% savings code. One great inclusion for folks wanting plenty of mobile backup support is the F3800 Portable Power Station for $1,615 shipped, after using the exclusive code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, beating Amazon’s pricing by $185. Normally $2,000 at full price these days since the brand made permanent price cuts across its lineup (originally $3,999), we saw this model offered for $1,599 during June’s Prime Day Sale event. During this sale you can add it to your power needs with $385 exclusive savings for the next-best price. You can also find it in a refurbished condition for $1,329.99 shipped, after using the same code, and be sure to head down below to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: This 10,000mAh 45W power bank with built-in USB-C cables can charge up to four devices, and it’s just $19 today (47% off)
items.summary:
Baseus 10,000mAh 45W power bank with dual built-in USB-C cables

Buy for $19 (Reg. $36)

Apply MOEPL7CI during checkout. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This compact Baseus power bank with a 10,000mAh battery is ideal for keeping as many as four devices topped up through a long day away from an outlet. One of its more notable features is the pair of built-in USB-C cables, which is a notable upgrade over the single integrated cable typically found on most battery packs. They also double as carry straps, making the unit easier to grab and bring along, while an onboard LED display gives you a quick look at the remaining battery level.

items.summary: Amazon is now offering Sony’s INZONE H3 wired gaming headset for $68 shipped. While this headset launched at the $98 price point, it has since climbed up, with the current going rate sitting at $118. Today’s deal takes $50 off and brings it back down to the best price we have tracked for it this year. We’ve seen it go for less in the past, but this is the lowest we have seen it drop since the price hike. It is a solid option for PS5 and PC gamers looking for a comfortable wired headset with low-latency audio, 360 Spatial Sound support, and more.
